name: myco
description: Agent-First symbiotic cognitive substrate. Eighteen fungal-named verbs (17 agent + 1 human-facing `brief`): germinate/fruit/molt/winnow/ramify/senesce/assimilate/sporulate/traverse + graft + brief. Bimodal senesce (full for PreCompact, --quick for SessionEnd) with 11-dimension immune including MP1 mycelium-purity guard. Editable-by-default install, substrate-local plugin loading via .myco/plugins/, ten automated MCP host writers. Every v0.5.2 verb alias still works through v1.0.0.
